seoKeywords: how much grout do I need

faq.q: How much grout do I need for ceramic tiles?
faq.a: Ceramic grout consumption is 0.5–0.8 kg/m² depending on your joint size—smaller joints use less, larger joints use more.

faq.q: What affects how much grout is needed?
faq.a: Joint size is the primary factor. Larger grout lines require more material per square meter.
Results are practical estimates ±5-10% depending on tile type, application method, and product absorption.

faq.q: Can I use this for stone or porcelain tiles?
faq.a: Yes. Consumption rates are similar for ceramic, porcelain, and natural stone. Adjust the joint size for your specific application.
